author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 7 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. 5 BROKEN tests (#1016-#1020) strengthened heterogeneously: agreement assertion + fn-pointer pins (#1016), runtime Float probe per implementor (#1017), non-empty amax/amin discriminator (#1018), logcumsumexp value verification via assert_close_f32 (#1019), profile_op_scope invocation between set/clear (#1020). Sabotage demo: logcumsumexp expected[0] 1.0 → 1.5 caught at tolerance line. Plumbing 62 PASS, reduction 21 PASS. Follow-up #1080 filed for orthogonal flex_attention fixture-format mismatch surfaced during evidence verification (not introduced by Phase 7).
